note: Advisory sandbox harness. Does NOT emit or imply D4/promotion PASS. Verdict vocab is CHECK_OK, never PASS.
title: Promotion-gate 'refusal teeth' harness

subject.author_not_subject: harness (author) is separate from the gate (subject); gate file unchanged

what_it_proves: conformant verifier receipt -> APPROVED_DRY_RUN, exit 0 (positive control)
8 minimal-mutation non-PASS receipts -> PROMOTION_GATE: REFUSED, exit 2, each with its SPECIFIC cause string
refusal reasons are cause-specific (different faults -> different reason lines), not the overloaded exit code 2
harness hard-refuses every deploy flag; run under HOME=temp with CF tokens unset -> no live deploy path reachable
red-run canary fires: asserting a bad receipt is 'approved' fails -> suite is red-capable, not green-by-construction
chess_patches_applied: assert specific refusal-cause STRING, never returncode==2 alone (exit 2 overloaded across 4+ paths)
conformant-PASS positive control reaching APPROVED_DRY_RUN exit 0
every negative fixture is a minimal mutation (one field) of the conformant receipt
flagless run, CF tokens unset, HOME on temp dir; never --deploy-command/--confirm-each-time/--semi-auto-window/--autonomous-deploy
ships a red-capable fixture + committed red-run canary
